name: kilimo-mcp
description: MCP server for Kenya precision agriculture — crop calendar, fertilizer guide, pest alerts, market timing, KALRO varieties, input cost calculator. 6 tools. 1st world equivalent: Climate Corp / Granular.

tools.name: crop_calendar
tools.description: Kenya crop planting and harvesting calendar by region

tools.name: fertilizer_guide
tools.description: Fertilizer recommendations by crop and soil type

tools.name: pest_disease_alert
tools.description: Crop pest and disease identification and management

tools.name: market_timing_guide
tools.description: Best timing to sell produce based on price cycles

tools.name: input_cost_calculator
tools.description: Kenya farm input cost calculator and comparison
